name: ExtensionTestPlan_TestTools
title: R5: A description of test tools to be used in the test plan - narrative for now (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestPlan.testTools` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestPlan.testTools` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `TestPlan.testTools` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestPlan.testTools` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.
Element `TestPlan.testTools` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
